task.title: Implement SaaS dashboard authentication
task.author: agent:A
task.goal: Add secure OAuth-based login and session management for the dashboard.
task.next: Wire OAuth callback handler and session store.

decision.title: Use OAuth 2.0 with PKCE
decision.author: agent:A
decision.decision: Adopt OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE for dashboard login.
decision.rationale: Balances security with implementation complexity; avoids password storage.

handoff.title: Initial auth handoff
handoff.author: agent:A
handoff.context: Authentication scope and decision are documented.
handoff.state: Task created, decision accepted, no code written yet.
handoff.next: Implement OAuth callback handler and session middleware.
